clusters.title: Watch: Beluga whales travel by plane and lorry to US from closed Canadian marine park
clusters.summary: Six beluga whales have arrived in Illinois and Texas after being moved from a Canadian marine park that could no longer care for them.

clusters.title: Minister says Australian IS-linked 'Doctor Jihad' can 'rot' in Iraqi jail
clusters.summary: Perth paediatrician Tareq Kamleh went to Syria to join the Islamic State group in 2015 and has, until now, been presumed dead.
